sys_script_fix.description:
NOTE: update in 2.8.4 | 2023-11-06 | STRY0146507 - Certification Failed Test Results - Provided the updates required to keep in product
2.7.3 This fix script resets all of the Schedule Counts on the template table. There is no harm in running this more than once. If counts are not correct, this can be run to correct counts. We believe all issues with Schedule Counts have been resolved. But, we left this in the application so customers can run if they see issues.
This fix script will fix the template counts for all schedules
Release Introduced: 2.7.3 - Only needs to be run a single time - This can be run IF Schedule Counts are not correct
Purpose: - This script corrects any issues related Scheduled Template Counts - The process all templates and does an aggregate count for Schedules for the template and updates teh schedule count field
Validation: Customers can spot check counts.
Or customers can open the Templates on one screen with the Templates showing and Schedule count showing. On another screen customers can open the Scheduled Tasks table and group by Template. The count of Schedule Tasks should match the count in the template table.
This Script can be run in TEST MODE by changing the "test" variable to true.
In test mode the counts are written for every Template and Schedule. 'Tasker 2.7.3 - Fix Temp Schedule Count - TEST RUN TO SHOW COUNTS - found (' + countTemplates + ') templates in System. ('+ countChangedTemplates + ') have the wrong count for template schedules. Change "test" variable to false in the Fix Script to update the schedule counts for ('+ countChangedTemplates + ') templates.'
When not in Test mode, the Number of Templates fixed will be listed 'Tasker 2.7.3 - Fix Temp Schedule Count - found (' + countTemplates + ') Templates in System. ('+ countChangedTemplates + ') had the wroung schedule count before fix script run. ('+ countChangedTemplates + ') were updated to correct the counts.'
If any values are wrong, report the differences to the DTech Apps support team.
sys_script_fix.name: Tasker 2.7.3 - Fix Temp Schedule Count
